context: The user has submitted a C++ pull request containing multiple potential memory leaks.

empathic_chain.observation: The code logic contains a circular dependency and does not include any unit tests.
empathic_chain.feeling: I sense their curiosity and a slight amount of confusion.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs objective, professional constructive feedback to improve engineering quality.
empathic_chain.request: Skip the tedious troubleshooting, directly provide guidance on the return/exchange process, and apologize.

output_format: Concept brief -> Core syntax -> Examples -> Practice suggestions
